subcodes.first_line: The fire hath been kindled through the deeds of the wicked ones who have violated God's Covenant and His Testament, and followed every remote oppressor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشتعلت النار من عمل الفجار الذین نقضوا عهد الله و میثاقه و اتبعوا کل ظالم بعید
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort
